title: 098 remediation child packets claim completion but fail strict validation
claim: The 098 remediation parent validates, but every claimed-complete child phase exits 2 under strict validation because authored docs do not match Level 2 template headers and anchors.
counterevidenceSought: Passing strict validation for any 098 child phase
Documented validator exception for these remediation child templates
Evidence these child phases are intentionally not completion-validated
alternativeExplanation: The children may have been generated from a lean custom template, but the official strict validator classifies the missing headers and anchors as errors.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if the official validator contract is changed to accept this lean child template and all 098 children validate strictly.
recommendation: Repair the 098 child docs against the Level 2 contract and rerun strict recursive validation on 098.

title: Native skill advisor fails explicit deep-review routing
claim: The default/native advisor path returns no recommendation for an explicit deep-review trigger, while the local Python fallback returns deep-review at high confidence.
counterevidenceSought: Native recommendation containing deep-review or system-spec-kit at confidence >=0.8
Discovery inventory exposing sk-deep-review as a canonical skill id
A documented rule that deep-review trigger phrases should abstain
alternativeExplanation: The native scorer appears to use the historical sk-deep-review id while the current inventory uses deep-review; the fallback path has the current id.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if native advisor returns deep-review/system-spec-kit at >=0.8 for the exact trigger phrase and a regression test covers it.
recommendation: Align native aliases/bonuses with the actual deep-review skill id and add an explicit trigger regression.

title: Findings registry reports zero open findings while state log carries active P1s
claim: Reducer-owned registry state is stale or unreduced, so convergence state says there are zero open findings despite iteration 7 carrying 10 active P1s.
counterevidenceSought: A later reducer run updating the registry with active findings
Documented rule that registry remains initialized during active review
A separate canonical registry superseding this file
alternativeExplanation: The reducer may not have been run after prior deltas, but the file is listed as the findings registry for this review and drives convergence decisions.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if the registry is regenerated from deltas and matches the active findings before any stop/synthesis decision.
recommendation: Replay/reduce deltas into the registry and guard against initialized zero-finding registry state once evidence-bearing iterations exist.
